---
title: ""
output: html_document
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
```

### S351 Slides and worksheet

Class (9/12): [Slides](Week1slides.pdf), [Worksheet 1](Worksheet1.pdf), [Worksheet 1 solution](worksheet1_solution.pdf)\
Class (9/19): [Slides](Week2Slides.pdf), [Worksheet 2](Worksheet2.pdf), [Worksheet 2 solution](worksheet2_solution.pdf)\
Class (9/26): [Slides](Week3slides.pdf), [Worksheet 3](Worksheet3.pdf), [Worksheet 3 solution](worksheet3_solution.pdf)\
Class (10/3): [Slides](Week4slides.pdf), [Worksheet 4](Worksheet4.pdf), [Worksheet 4 solution](worksheet4_solution.pdf)\
Class (10/10): [Slides](Week5slides.pdf), [Worksheet 5](Worksheet5.pdf), [Worksheet 5 solution](worksheet5_solution.pdf)\
Class (10/17): [Slides](Week6slides.pdf), [Worksheet 6](Worksheet6.pdf), [Worksheet 6 solution](worksheet6_solution.pdf)\
Class (10/24): [Slides](Week7slides.pdf), [Worksheet 7](Worksheet7.pdf), [Worksheet 7 solution](worksheet7_solution.pdf)\
Class (10/31): [Slides](Week8slides.pdf), [Worksheet 8](Worksheet8.pdf), [Worksheet 8 solution](worksheet8_solution.pdf)\
Class (11/07): [Slides](Week9slides.pdf), [Worksheet 9](Worksheet9.pdf), [Worksheet 9 solution](worksheet9_solution.pdf)\
Class (11/14): [Slides](Week10slides.pdf), [Worksheet 10](Worksheet10.pdf), [Worksheet 10 solution](worksheet10_solution.pdf)\
Class (11/21): [Slides](Week11slides.pdf), [Worksheet 11](Worksheet11.pdf), [Worksheet 11 solution](worksheet11_solution.pdf)\
Class (11/28): [Slides](Week12slides.pdf), [Worksheet 12](Worksheet12.pdf), [Worksheet 12 solution](worksheet12_solution.pdf)\
Class (12/05): [Testing Cheatsheet](cheatsheet.pdf), [Worksheet 13](Worksheet13.pdf), [Worksheet 13 solution](worksheet13_solution.pdf)\
Class (12/12): [Final Review](finalreview.pdf)
